title: Copper gains as China throws more stimulus measures at economy
section_path: Copper gains as China throws more stimulus measures at economy
section_path_text: Copper gains as China throws more stimulus measures at economy
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
A risk-off tone across markets helped push commodities higher in choppy trading. A weaker USD also boosted investor appetite. Image reference: 1661464589241.png | assets/2022-08-26_copper-gains-as-china-throws-more-stimulus-measures-at-economy_img_1661464589241_c1eebc6b4a31.png
Copper led the base metals sector higher as China increased its support of the economy with a CNY1tn of measures to bolster growth.
